_comment: Not shipped as a completed locale. First release is Chinese-only (see ui.i18n.release_scope). Keys fall back to display_name.json.

ui.maintenance.banner_active: Project maintenance in progress ({kind} · {phase}). Saves and runs are blocked until it finishes.
ui.maintenance.banner_failed: Project maintenance failed ({kind} · {phase}): {error}. Fix the issue before saving or running.
